hypotheses.claim: The owner browser ignores the validated snapshot and can race a second resources fetch.
The owner browser has no installed cursor/authority version before deltas.
Backend stream scope exists, but browser-side snapshot/delta scope validation is incomplete.
Web, SMS, and signed Review do not yet have exact fixture-free convergence proof on one durable work object.
Receipt-backed completion and owner proof refinding are not yet complete across golden journeys.
Fixture paths are explicitly labeled but can still distort acceptance unless tests assert fixture-free state.
